reforms.description: A 10 percent investment tax credit on equipment and machinery was provided to promote structural changes in industry, effective until the end of FY 1980.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The investment tax credit incentivizes firms to invest in equipment and machinery, which can enhance productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax credit was effective until the end of FY 1980.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is a minor adjustment aimed at promoting investment rather than a significant overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: A 10 percent investment tax credit on equipment and machinery was provided to promote structural changes in industry.

reforms.description: Japan has implemented a comprehensive programme to promote energy conservation, develop alternative sources of supply, and encourage research and technological improvements in energy policy.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The programme aims to enhance energy efficiency and innovation in energy technologies, which can lead to long-term economic benefits.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been implemented to promote energy conservation and technological improvements.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme represents a significant and comprehensive approach to energy policy and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Important non-price measures have also been taken, in accordance with specific legislation enacted in recent years, to promote energy conservation, to develop alternative sources of supply and to encourage research and technological improvements.
